title: Stop return key from sending email
excerpt: How do I get my email to stop sending when I hit return as I type! It’s really awful and unprofessional to keep having to apologize. when it happens.  Where do I turn this awful feature off?

posts.author: aw821 (Alicia Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I get my email to stop sending when I hit return as I type! It’s really awful and unprofessional to keep having to apologize. when it happens. Where do I turn this awful feature off?

posts.author: Ace (Asa Nadeau)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you tried holding shift or control keys while typing return key?

posts.author: BigRedOak (Lee de lang)
posts.cookedHtml: Was there a solution discovered? Agree, it’s awkward sending half composed emails and difficult to adjust muscle memory.
